executive_summary: Global conditions are precarious. Significant supply chain and energy pressures, coupled with social and economic vulnerabilities, suggest a high probability of cascading systemic failures. Taiwan media panic relative to physical change is concerning.
correlations: High Supply Chain Stress directly correlates with both Middle East Energy Spike and Global Fuel Reserves depletion rate. Wealth Inequality Fracture Gap amplifies potential social unrest triggered by fuel shortages.
